briefs.title: BC Utilities Commission directed to approve North Coast Transmission Line cost recovery rates
briefs.summary: A new provincial direction requires the BC Utilities Commission to add three new Electric Tariff Supplements and prohibits it from disallowing recovery of North Coast Transmission Line project costs from ratepayers.
briefs.action_required: Review your BC Hydro electric tariff rate schedules for upcoming supplemental rate changes that may affect your energy costs.
briefs.industries: Natural Resources, Construction & Development, Transportation & Logistics
